title: Command Grid
summary: Sharper suite-shell direction for mixed-media and business operations: blue command accents, tighter radius, and registry-first install cards.

seedMaterial.usage: Exploratory cue reference only; no logo source or final mark is redistributed by this descriptor.

presentation.layout: command-board shell with registry graph and media/status panes
presentation.chrome: tight cards, tabular metadata, strong install/provenance affordances
presentation.markTreatment: abstract glasses or bow-grid emblem for small package and app icons
bestFor: registry item choice and install inspection
risks: can feel too cold unless paired with the soft character cue
requires careful contrast checks for blue accent on dark surfaces

contrastTargets: foreground/background remains inherited from the factory semantic pairs
blue accent is intended for command states and selected registry rows
